# Loop

> Loop is an operator desk for self-updating agent skills. It monitors, evaluates, and updates agent playbooks so every skill stays current.

## What Loop Does

Loop turns agent playbooks, source scans, and upstream documentation into a living skill catalog that evolves on its own. Skills are versioned, tracked, and refreshed on a configurable schedule using AI agents.

## Core Concepts

- **Skills**: Versioned playbooks with a body, description, tags, category, tracked sources, automation settings, and complete version history. Skills can come from repos, the Codex directory, a remote URL, or be written from scratch.
- **Automations**: Scheduled agent runs that refresh skills by scanning tracked sources, researching the web, and drafting new revisions.
- **MCP Servers**: Model Context Protocol integrations that connect AI agents to external tools (GitHub, Slack, Supabase, Stripe, Figma, and 70+ more).
- **Sandbox**: An isolated agent chat environment with Vercel Sandbox sessions for testing skills interactively.

## Key Pages

- / — Skill catalog home (browse, search, filter by category)
- /skills/{slug}/{version} — Skill detail page with body, version history, automation controls, observability
- /mcps/{name}/{version} — MCP server detail page
- /sandbox — Agent sandbox with provider/model selection and skill attachment
- /faq — Frequently asked questions (10 sections, 60+ questions)
- /settings — Account settings, subscription, automations, imports, system health
- /privacy — Privacy policy
- /terms — Terms of service

## Pricing

- **Free** ($0): Browse catalog, create up to 10 skills, run up to 3 automations, full Sandbox access.
- **Operator** ($5/mo): Unlimited automations, model selection, custom import sources, marketplace pricing, Stripe Connect payouts.

## Tech Stack

Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Supabase (Postgres), Clerk (auth), Stripe (billing), Vercel AI SDK, Vercel Sandbox.

## APIs

- /api/skills/{slug}/raw — Raw skill markdown (text/markdown). Append ?v=N for a specific version.
- /api/skills/raw/all — Plain-text index of all public skills and MCP servers.
- /api/skills/{slug}/icon — Resolved skill icon URL.
- /api/mcps/{name}/icon — Resolved MCP server icon URL.
